ogTitle: Aireys Inlet vs Airly: Climate Safety

heading: Aireys Inlet vs Airly — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Aireys Inlet, Victoria and Airly, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Airly has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Aireys Inlet (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Aireys Inlet or Airly safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Aireys Inlet has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Airly scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Aireys Inlet scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Airly scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Aireys Inlet or Airly?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Airly has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
